hbs.m_section_title: {{> a_eyebrow }} {{> a_h2 }} {{> a_description }}
hbs.o_cards:
{{> m_section_title }}
{{#each items}} <{{#if href}}a href="{{href}}"{{else}}div{{/if}} class="card col-3{{#unless a_image.src}} card--no-image{{/unless}}"> {{> a_image }} {{> a_h3 }} {{> a_description }} {{/each}}

{{> m_section_title }} {{#each items}}
{{> a_h3 }} {{> a_description }}
{{/each}}

{{> m_section_title }}
{{#each columns}}
{{> a_h3 }}

    • {{/each}}
{{/each}}

{{> m_section_title }} {{#each items}}
{{> a_h3 }} {{> a_icon icon='chevron-down' stroke='#747474' }}

{{/each}}

{{> a_h3 }} {{#if links}}

  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/if}}
{{/each}}

hbs.r_html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html
 lang="{{#if main.settings.lang}}{{main.settings.lang}}{{else}}en{{/if}}">
<head>
{{#each settings.start_head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.start_head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.alternate}}
<link
 rel="alternate"
 hreflang="{{hreflang}}"
 href="{{href}}">
{{/each}}
<meta
 charset="UTF-8">
<meta
 name="color-scheme"
 content="light dark">
<script>(t=localStorage.theme)&&document.documentElement.classList.add(t)</script>
{{#with settings}}
<style>
/* Colors — Light (manual toggle) */
html.light {
--color_primary: {{#if color_primary}}{{color_primary}}{{else}}#6210FE{{/if}};
--color_primary-hover: {{#if color_primary-hover}}{{color_primary-hover}}{{else}}#8140FE{{/if}};
--color_accent: {{#if color_accent}}{{color_accent}}{{else}}#30FE10{{/if}};
--color_text: {{#if color_text}}{{color_text}}{{else}}#333333{{/if}};
--color_text-muted: {{#if color_text-muted}}{{color_text-muted}}{{else}}#717171{{/if}};
--color_text-inverted: {{#if color_text-inverted}}{{color_text-inverted}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--color_border: {{#if color_border}}{{color_border}}{{else}}#e5e7eb{{/if}};
--bg_body: {{#if bg_body}}{{bg_body}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--bg_surface: {{#if bg_surface}}{{bg_surface}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
}
/* Colors — Light (system preference) */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {
html:not(.light):not(.dark) {
--color_primary: {{#if color_primary}}{{color_primary}}{{else}}#6210FE{{/if}};
--color_primary-hover: {{#if color_primary-hover}}{{color_primary-hover}}{{else}}#8140FE{{/if}};
--color_accent: {{#if color_accent}}{{color_accent}}{{else}}#30FE10{{/if}};
--color_text: {{#if color_text}}{{color_text}}{{else}}#333333{{/if}};
--color_text-muted: {{#if color_text-muted}}{{color_text-muted}}{{else}}#717171{{/if}};
--color_text-inverted: {{#if color_text-inverted}}{{color_text-inverted}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--color_border: {{#if color_border}}{{color_border}}{{else}}#e5e7eb{{/if}};
--bg_body: {{#if bg_body}}{{bg_body}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--bg_surface: {{#if bg_surface}}{{bg_surface}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
} }
/* Colors — Dark (manual toggle) */
{{#with dark_scheme_colors}}
html.dark {
--color_primary: {{#if color_primary}}{{color_primary}}{{else}}#8140FE{{/if}};
--color_primary-hover: {{#if color_primary-hover}}{{color_primary-hover}}{{else}}#9960FF{{/if}};
--color_accent: {{#if color_accent}}{{color_accent}}{{else}}#30FE10{{/if}};
--color_text: {{#if color_text}}{{color_text}}{{else}}#e0e0e0{{/if}};
--color_text-muted: {{#if color_text-muted}}{{color_text-muted}}{{else}}#a0a0a0{{/if}};
--color_text-inverted: {{#if color_text-inverted}}{{color_text-inverted}}{{else}}#141414{{/if}};
--color_border: {{#if color_border}}{{color_border}}{{else}}#2a2a2a{{/if}};
--bg_body: {{#if bg_body}}{{bg_body}}{{else}}#121212{{/if}};
--bg_surface: {{#if bg_surface}}{{bg_surface}}{{else}}#1e1e1e{{/if}};
}
/* Colors — Dark (system preference) */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
html:not(.light):not(.dark) {
--color_primary: {{#if color_primary}}{{color_primary}}{{else}}#8140FE{{/if}};
--color_primary-hover: {{#if color_primary-hover}}{{color_primary-hover}}{{else}}#9960FF{{/if}};
--color_accent: {{#if color_accent}}{{color_accent}}{{else}}#30FE10{{/if}};
--color_text: {{#if color_text}}{{color_text}}{{else}}#e0e0e0{{/if}};
--color_text-muted: {{#if color_text-muted}}{{color_text-muted}}{{else}}#a0a0a0{{/if}};
--color_text-inverted: {{#if color_text-inverted}}{{color_text-inverted}}{{else}}#141414{{/if}};
--color_border: {{#if color_border}}{{color_border}}{{else}}#2a2a2a{{/if}};
--bg_body: {{#if bg_body}}{{bg_body}}{{else}}#121212{{/if}};
--bg_surface: {{#if bg_surface}}{{bg_surface}}{{else}}#1e1e1e{{/if}};
} }
{{/with}}
/* Apply colors immediately (before external CSS loads) */
html, body {
background-color: var(--bg_body);
color: var(--color_text);
}
/* Fonts */
:root {
--font-heading: {{#if font-heading}}{{font-heading}}{{else}}ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif{{/if}};
--font-body: {{#if font-body}}{{font-body}}{{else}}ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"{{/if}};
}
/* Radius */
:root {
--radius-sm: {{#if radius-sm}}{{radius-sm}}{{else}}.25rem{{/if}};
--radius-md: {{#if radius-md}}{{radius-md}}{{else}}.5rem{{/if}};
--radius-lg: {{#if radius-lg}}{{radius-lg}}{{else}}1rem{{/if}};
}
</style>
{{/with}}
<link
 rel="icon"
 href="/favicon.ico"
 sizes="16x16 32x32 48x48">
<link
 rel="icon"
 href="/assets/icons/icon-192.png"
 type="image/png"
 sizes="192x192">
<link
 rel="apple-touch-icon"
 href="/assets/icons/apple-touch-icon.png">
<meta
 name="viewport"
 content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<link
 rel="preload"
 href="/style.min.{{timestamp}}.css"
 as="style">
<link
 rel="stylesheet"
 href="/style.min.{{timestamp}}.css">
{{#with main.seo}}
{{#if title}}
<title>{{title}}</title>
{{/if}}
{{#if description}}
<meta
 name="description"
 content="{{description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if keywords}}
<meta
 name="keywords"
 content="{{keywords}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
<link
 rel="canonical"
 href="{{og.url}}">
{{/if}}
<meta
 name="robots"
 content="index, follow">
{{/with}}
{{#with main.seo}}
{{#if og}}
{{#if og.title}}
<meta
 property="og:title"
 content="{{og.title}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.description}}
<meta
 property="og:description"
 content="{{og.description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
<meta
 property="og:url"
 content="{{og.url}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.type}}
<meta
 property="og:type"
 content="{{og.type}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image}}
{{#if og.image.src}}
<meta
 property="og:image"
 content="{{og.image.src}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image.alt}}
<meta
 property="og:image:alt"
 content="{{og.image.alt}}">
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter}}
{{#if twitter.card}}
<meta
 name="twitter:card"
 content="{{twitter.card}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.title}}
<meta
 name="twitter:title"
 content="{{twitter.title}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.description}}
<meta
 name="twitter:description"
 content="{{twitter.description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.image}}
{{#if twitter.image.src}}
<meta
 name="twitter:image"
 content="{{twitter.image.src}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.image.alt}}
<meta
 name="twitter:image:alt"
 content="{{twitter.image.alt}}">
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/with}}
{{#each settings.files}}
{{#if use}}
{{#eq name "llms.txt"}}
<link
 rel="alternate"
 type="text/plain"
 href="/llms.txt">
{{/eq}}
{{#eq name "site.webmanifest"}}
<link
 rel="manifest"
 href="/site.webmanifest">
{{/eq}}
{{#eq name "humans.txt"}}
<link
 rel="author"
 type="text/plain"
 href="/humans.txt">
{{/eq}}
{{/if}}
{{/each}}
{{#each settings.head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#with main.seo}}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@type": "WebPage"
{{#if title}}
,"name": "{{{title}}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if description}}
,"description": "{{{description}}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
,"url": "{{og.url}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image}}
{{#if og.image.src}}
,"primaryImageOfPage": {
"@type": "ImageObject",
"url": "{{og.image.src}}"
}
{{/if}}
{{/if}} }
</script>
{{/with}}
</head>
<body
{{#if main.settings.body_id}}
 id="{{main.settings.body_id}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if main.settings.body_class}}
 class="{{main.settings.body_class}}"
{{/if}}>
{{#each settings.start_body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.start_body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
<header id="header">
{{#each header.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</header>
<main id="main">
{{#each main.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</main>
<footer id="footer">
{{#each footer.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</footer>
{{{js}}}
{{#each main.settings.body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each settings.body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
</body>
</html>

css.o_header: .o_header{background:var(--bg_surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color_border);z-index:100;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;padding-block:1rem;position:fixed;inset:0 0 auto;transition:transform .3s ease;body.header_hidden &{transform:translateY(-100%)}body.menu_opened &{transform:translateY(0)}.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;text-decoration:none}.a_image img{width:3rem;height:3rem;border-radius:50%;border:.25rem solid black}.brand-name{font-family:var(--font_heading);font-weight:500;font-size:1.25rem;color:var(--color_text)}.actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-left:auto;@media (min-width:64rem){order:3;margin-left:0}.a_button{padding:.3125rem .75rem;&.secondary{display:none;@media (min-width:48rem){display:flex}}}}.theme-toggle{display:flex;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;border:none;padding:0;color:var(--color_text-muted);--icon_size:1.25rem;&:hover{color:var(--color_text)}[data-icon="sun"]{display:none}html.dark & [data-icon="sun"]{display:block}html.dark & [data-icon="moon"]{display:none}@media (prefers-color-scheme:dark){html:not(.light):not(.dark) & [data-icon="sun"]{display:block}html:not(.light):not(.dark) & [data-icon="moon"]{display:none}}}.menu-toggle{display:flex;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;border:none;padding:0;color:var(--color_text-muted);--icon_size:1.5rem;&:hover{color:var(--color_text)}body:not(.menu_opened) & [data-icon="x"]{display:none}body.menu_opened & [data-icon="menu"]{display:none}@media (min-width:64rem){display:none}}nav{display:none;margin-left:auto;a{color:var(--color_text-muted);text-decoration:none;&:hover{color:var(--color_text)}}@media (min-width:64rem){order:2;display:flex;gap:.75rem}body.menu_opened &{display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;height:calc(100dvh - 5rem );background:var(--bg_surface);overflow-y:auto;padding:2rem 1.75rem;text-align:right;border-top:1px solid var(--color_border);a{display:block;padding:.375rem 0}}}}main#main{border-top:5rem solid var(--bg_body)}body.menu_opened{overflow:hidden}
css.o_sicknesslabs: .o_sicknesslabs{--color-yes:#22c55e;--color-unsure:#f59e0b;--color-no:#ef4444;padding-bottom:0;.container{padding-bottom:3rem;.a_h2{font-weight:400}}.question{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;background:var(--bg_surface);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:1.5rem;.a_description{font-size:.875rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin-top:-.25rem}.answers{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.5rem}button{padding:.625rem 1.5rem;border:1px solid var(--color_text-muted);background:transparent;color:var(--color_text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:.875rem;font-weight:500;transition:background .3s,color .3s,border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;&:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--color_accent);outline-offset:2px}&.active{border-color:transparent;color:#fff;&[data-val="0"]{background:var(--color-yes);box-shadow:0 1px 3px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color-yes) 40%,transparent)}&[data-val="1"]{background:var(--color-unsure);box-shadow:0 1px 3px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color-unsure) 40%,transparent)}&[data-val="2"]{background:var(--color-no);box-shadow:0 1px 3px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color-no) 40%,transparent)}}}}.diagnosis{&.sticky{@media (min-width:48rem){position:sticky;bottom:0;z-index:10}}margin-top:3rem;background:var(--bg_surface);border-top:1px solid var(--color_border);.header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-block:3rem;.count{font-family:var(--font_heading);font-size:2rem;font-weight:800}}.bars{margin-bottom:1rem;div{text-align:center}b{display:block;font-family:var(--font_heading);font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--color_text);margin-bottom:.25rem;&::after{content:"";display:block;height:6px;background:var(--color_border);border-radius:2px;margin-top:.25rem}}div[data-val="0"] b::after{background:var(--color-yes)}div[data-val="1"] b::after{background:var(--color-unsure)}div[data-val="2"] b::after{background:var(--color-no)}em{display:block;font-style:normal;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin-top:.25rem}}.verdict{color:var(--color_text-muted)}}}
